About.title: About Me
About.description: Computer Engineering graduate specializing in Frontend Development (React/Next.js) with Full-Stack experience. Skilled in translating Figma designs into responsive, production-ready websites. Experienced in delivering production-grade projects within the LINE Ecosystem. Having completed all coursework, I am available to start working full-time immediately.

hrManager.title: HR Manager Webpage
hrManager.description: A web application for internal employee data management, featuring employee CRUD operations, department structural logs, and job position assignments. Developed using Next.js for the Frontend and PostgreSQL for data scaling.

nomnoey.title: Nomnoey Webpage
nomnoey.description: A fully responsive, modern single-page restaurant portfolio website featuring dynamic layouts built natively using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

ploclo.title: PLOCLO Management System
ploclo.description: A robust content and project management platform developed for PLOCLO (a subsidiary of LINE) to streamline internal project tasks and resource allocations using Next.js and PostgreSQL.

nuHackathon.title: NU Hackathon & Pitching Competition
nuHackathon.description: Participated in the hackathon, collaborating within a 48-hour timeframe to design, develop, and pitch a specialized mobile application tailored for software testers, integrated with AI features to optimize automated reporting workflows.

nuProduction.title: President of Gear NU Production Club
nuProduction.description: Honored with the Outstanding Extracurricular Student Leader Award (Academic Year 2024) from Naresuan University for demonstrating exceptional leadership, driving club initiatives, and managing collaborative student activities.
